title: Verification
description: Verification schema from Bandwidth toll-free-verification API

verificationId.description: The unique identifier for the verification request

telephoneNumbers.description: The toll-free numbers associated with this verification

businessName.description: The business name on the verification

submissionDate.description: The date and time the verification was submitted

verificationDate.description: The date and time the verification was approved or denied

denialReason.description: The reason for denial, if the verification was denied
